meta.title: Treatment — Vincor | 3-Phase Treatment Model
meta.description: The Vincor 3-Phase Treatment Model: from relaxation splint to full reconstruction. Discover how we treat jaw and posture complaints step by step.

hero.title: Our 3-Phase Treatment Model
hero.description: A step-by-step approach that starts with relaxation and ends with lasting recovery. Each phase builds on the previous one, so your body has time to adapt structurally.

introduction.title: A phased approach for lasting results
introduction.description: At Vincor, we believe that structural complaints cannot be resolved with a single intervention. Our 3-phase model combines advanced diagnostics with proven splint therapy and, if necessary, definitive reconstruction. This way, we treat the cause, not just the symptom.

overviewSteps.title: Relaxation
overviewSteps.description: Relaxation of the jaw and back musculature and initial diagnostics at Vincor.

overviewSteps.title: Repositioning
overviewSteps.description: Correction of the bite and posture balance with a custom-made splint at Vincor.

overviewSteps.title: Reconstruction
overviewSteps.description: Definitive restoration through orthodontics, implantology, or prosthodontics at PDA.

phaseCards.title: Your treatment journey in detail
phaseCards.description: Each phase has a clear goal and is only started when the previous phase has delivered the desired result.

phases.title: Relaxation Splint
phases.description: The first step focuses on relaxing the jaw, neck, and back musculature. Simultaneously, we perform an extensive diagnostic scan to map the relationship between your bite and posture.
features: Analysis of jaw joint and muscle tone
Reduction of muscle tension and pain complaints

phases.title: Repositioning Splint
phases.description: Based on the diagnostics from phase 1, we manufacture a repositioning splint. This corrects the occlusion (bite) and restores the postural balance between jaw, spine, and pelvis.
features: Detailed occlusion analysis and bite registration
Repositioning of the lower jaw to optimal position
Restoration of postural balance (back, neck, pelvis)
Personalized treatment plan with progress reporting

phases.title: Reconstruction
phases.description: When splint therapy proves insufficient or a definitive solution is desired, we refer you to our partner center PDA for orthodontics, implantology, or full denture reconstruction.
features: Follow-up and control in collaboration with Vincor

bodySplint.title: The splint that treats your body as a whole
paragraphs: The Vincor BodySplint is not an ordinary dental splint. Based on your personal 4D scan, the splint is designed so that it not only relieves the jaw joints but also brings the spine and pelvis into a better position.

By correcting the interaction between occlusion (bite) and posture, patients often experience improvement of complaints they never associated with their jaw: back pain, neck complaints, headaches, and even sleep problems.
features: Corrects the relationship between bite and posture
Measurable result through before and after measurements

cta.title: Ready to take the first step?
cta.description: Make an appointment for your first scan and discover which treatment phase suits you.
